pillar_metadata.name: Cohesion
pillar_metadata.description: The force that keeps entities together as a system.

flocking_algorithm.impact: Creates clustering behavior and team-based movement.

scale_control.impact: Determines the effective operational reach of the unit.

fragmentation.result: Units operate in isolation; loss of the benefits of scale.

forced_conformity.result: Loss of individuality; system becomes unable to adapt to local noise.
